name: Alfa Laval AB
h1: Alfa Laval's GCC footprint in India
lede: Alfa Laval runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Satara, covering manufacturing and ssc, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alfa Laval office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alfa Laval AB GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alfa Laval runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Satara), covering manufacturing and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Alfa Laval's India footprint covers Pune and Satara, spanning manufacturing and ssc. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Industrial Equipment and Machinery, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 24 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Alfa Laval operate in India?
faq.a: Alfa Laval operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alfa Laval have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Alfa Laval's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Satara.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Alfa Laval run in India?
faq.a: Alfa Laval runs manufacturing and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alfa Laval's India GCCs?
faq.a: Alfa Laval's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alfa Laval's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 24 leaders at Alfa Laval's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
